jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at BlinkIt
jsonLd.description:
Join the BlinkIt family as a SEO Specialist in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BlinkIt:
BlinkIt is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlinkIt!
